records.question: Where is the location in UT with the address 316 S. State St that has a Manager hired on 1/29/91 requiring a 4 year degree whose performance is Poor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE location.address = '316 S. State St' AND position.positiontitle = 'Manager' AND employee.hiredate = '1/29/91' AND position.educationrequired = '4 year degree' AND employee.performance = 'Poor' AND location.state = 'UT'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT l.locationID
FROM location l
JOIN employee e ON l.locationID = e.locationID
JOIN position p ON e.positionID = p.positionID
WHERE l.state = 'UT'
  AND l.address = '316 S. State St'
  AND p.positiontitle = 'Manager'
  AND e.hiredate = '1/29/91'
  AND p.educationrequired = '4 year degree'
  AND e.performance = 'Poor'

records.question: Which locations with a zipcode of at least 15648 have employees working there?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
WHERE location.zipcode >= 15648
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT l.locationID
FROM location l
JOIN employee e ON l.locationID = e.locationID
WHERE l.zipcode >= 15648
